title: Spicy Light Russian Jumbo Shrimp Skillet
description: A spicy and light Russian-inspired skillet dish featuring jumbo shrimp, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is FODMAP-friendly and can be prepared in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced green onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the garlic-infused oil, smoked paprika, dried dill weed, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper (if using) to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the jumbo shrimp to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer. Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the skillet.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve the shrimp and sauce hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
